issues.description: DSL is missing the [On Play] effect entirely. Card has two effects: (1) [On Play] DON!! −10 effect that places Characters at bottom of deck and grants extra turn, and (2) [Activate: Main] effect. Only the second effect is partially captured, and even that is incomplete.
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' for the primary effect, not 'Activated'. The [Activate: Main] effect should be a separate effect with trigger 'Activated'.

The [On Play] effect requires multiple actions: ReturnToHand or similar for placing Characters at bottom of deck, and a Win/turn-grant action. Current DSL only has GiveDon which doesn't match the effect.
Missing conditions for the [On Play] effect's DON!! cost requirement (DON!! −10). This should be a condition checking attached DON!!.
GiveDon action is incorrect for the [Activate: Main] effect context. The effect should search/add DON!! from DON!! deck and set as active, which requires SearchDeck or similar action.
